Review

Semrush Review 2026: Is It Still Worth $130/mo for SEO?

In-depth review of Semrush's evolution into an intelligence engine for the AI search era. We test its latest AI visibility tools and traditional SEO features.

By SlashAI Editorial · June 26, 2026 ·semrush, seo, review, keyword research, competitor analysis, ai visibility

Quick verdict: Semrush has successfully transformed from a traditional SEO toolkit into an “intelligence engine” for the AI search era. With its AI Visibility Toolkit, AI Search Visibility Checker, and integration with Perplexity via MCP Connector, it provides unmatched insights into both traditional SEO and AI search performance. While expensive, it remains the most comprehensive SEO platform available.

What Is Semrush?

Semrush is the most comprehensive SEO platform available. Keyword research, competitor analysis, backlink auditing, site health checks, position tracking, content optimization — it does everything. Over 10 million marketers use it.

Recent updates include major brand transformation repositioning as unified “intelligence engine” for AI search era, new visual identity rolling out March 2026, launched “Spotlight 2026” AI-focused marketing conference, ChatGPT app integration released, and ongoing pursuit of Adobe acquisition. Q4/FY 2025 financial results also released.

In April 2026, Semrush continued advancements of Semrush One (unifying traditional SEO with AI visibility tracking), Enterprise AI Optimization (forecasting features, persona-based prompt generation), Enterprise Site Intelligence (Crawler Profiles for AI Agents and Search Bots), regional expansion (Israel keyword database), brand identity rollout, and Spotlight 2026 conference emphasis.

In May 2026, Semrush focused on AI search visibility and integration. Updates include partnership with Lovable for search intelligence within building experience, Enterprise AI Optimization with new Reddit and Negative Sentiment Analysis capabilities, YouTube Gap Analyzer in App Center, and Semrush One combining traditional SEO with AI visibility tracking.

In June 2026, Semrush highlighted the shift to AI search and introduced tools to help marketers adapt: AI Visibility Toolkit and AI Search Visibility Checker to analyze brand visibility across AI search platforms like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google’s AI Overviews; monitoring metrics such as mentions, citations, and on-SERP presence; content strategy recommendations for creating high-value, extractable content; technical readiness via Site Audit tool; and Prompt Research tool to discover relevant questions people ask AI. Semrush emphasizes that while AI search may reduce clicks to source websites for basic information, it creates new opportunities for brands to be cited and gain visibility, especially for pages that provide specific, authoritative, and comprehensive answers.

Core SEO Features (Still Industry-Leading)

Keyword Research & Competitive Analysis

  • Keyword Overview and Keyword Magic Tool
  • Competitive positioning and gap analysis
  • Traffic analytics and market explorer
  • Backlink analytics and audit

Site Optimization & Technical SEO

  • Site Audit for technical SEO issues
  • On-page SEO checker
  • Content audit and SEO writing assistant
  • Log file analyzer for crawling insights

Content Marketing & Research

  • Topic research and content outline builder
  • SEO Content Template and SEO Writing Assistant
  • Brand monitoring and brand monitoring
  • Social media tracker and poster

Advertising & PPC

  • Advertising research and PLA research
  • Social media ads tracker
  • Display advertising
  • Landing page optimizer

AI Search Visibility Features (New in 2026)

AI Visibility Toolkit & AI Search Visibility Checker

  • Analyzes brand visibility across AI search platforms (ChatGPT, Gemini, Google’s AI Overviews)
  • Tracks metrics: mentions, citations, and on-SERP presence
  • Provides competitive benchmarking against rivals

Content Strategy for AI Search

  • Recommendations for creating high-value, extractable content
  • Guidance on using visuals, videos, examples, and clear structure
  • Focus on specific, authoritative, comprehensive answers that AI cites

Technical Readiness for AI Crawlers

  • Site Audit tool adapted for AI crawlers
  • Recommendations for making content accessible to AI bots
  • Technical SEO adjustments for AI search visibility

Prompt Research Tool

  • Discover relevant questions people ask AI platforms
  • Understand user intent in conversational search
  • Inform content creation based on actual AI queries

June 2026 Updates: Adobe Acquisition & AI Visibility Expansion

In June 2026, Semrush announced several significant developments:

  • Adobe agreed to acquire Semrush in a cash deal valued at $1.9 billion (reported by Simply Wall St. on June 7, 2026)
  • AI Visibility Index 2026 Study analyzing 126 million real user prompts across 22 industries and four AI platforms
  • Launch of MCP (Model Context Protocol) Connector in Perplexity, integrating search intelligence directly within Perplexity AI
  • Launch of Traffic Insights in Traffic Analytics (AI-powered feature for identifying competitor traffic spikes and drops)
  • Expansion of AI Visibility Database to cover 32 countries
  • Enhanced Enterprise Content Optimization unifying content across SEO and AI search
  • Introduction of Adobe Brand Visibility unifying Semrush’s AI visibility intelligence with Adobe’s content optimization

Pros

  • Most comprehensive SEO platform available
  • Industry-leading keyword research and competitor analysis
  • Excellent site audit and technical SEO tools
  • AI Visibility Toolkit provides unique insights into AI search performance
  • Strong integrations with Google Analytics, Search Console, and now Perplexity
  • Regular updates and new feature releases
  • Massive user community and extensive knowledge base
  • Recently acquired by Adobe, ensuring continued investment and development

Cons

  • Expensive for solopreneurs and small businesses
  • Steep learning curve due to vast feature set
  • Interface can feel overwhelming with so many tools
  • Some advanced features require technical expertise
  • Historical data limits in some reports

Who Should Use Semrush

Semrush is worth it if:

  • You’re a serious SEO practitioner or agency
  • You need comprehensive data for keyword research and competitor analysis
  • You want to track performance in both traditional search and AI search
  • You rely on search traffic for your business or clients
  • You have the budget for a premium SEO tool ($130+/mo)
  • You want a single platform that does almost everything related to search marketing

Semrush might be overkill if:

  • You’re a beginner with basic SEO needs
  • You’re on a very tight budget (<$500/mo)
  • You only need basic keyword research or rank tracking
  • You prefer specialized tools over an all-in-one platform
  • You don’t do client work or run a search-dependent business

Final Score

CategoryScore
Keyword Research10/10
Competitor Analysis10/10
Site Audit & Technical SEO9.5/10
Rank Tracking9/10
AI Visibility Tools9.5/10
Content Marketing Features8.5/10
Advertising (PPC) Features8/10
Value for Money7/10
Overall9.0/10

Bottom line: Semrush remains the gold standard for comprehensive SEO platforms. Its evolution into an intelligence engine for the AI search era makes it even more valuable for businesses that want to stay ahead in both traditional and AI-powered search. While expensive, it delivers unmatched depth and breadth of features that justify the cost for serious search marketing professionals.

Review based on testing Semrush during its June 2026 AI visibility toolkit release and Adobe acquisition announcement period.
